Updated March 2026 · Verified Game Data

Bizarre Lineage Sub Abilities:
The Complete 2026 Guide

Bizarre Lineage Sub Abilities layer powerful passive bonuses and active combat skills on top of your Stand and Fighting Style. Mastering the right sub-ability is the difference between winning close fights and getting outclassed by opponents who chose a better setup.

3 Active Sub-Abilities 1 Coming Soon Verified Locations
Explore All Sub Abilities

Why Bizarre Lineage Sub Abilities Change Everything

In Bizarre Lineage, your Stand determines your primary damage type and ultimate abilities. But Bizarre Lineage Sub Abilities define your passive identity in combat. Each sub-ability unlocks three unique active moves (T, Y, U keys) plus a permanent passive effect that is always active — even while your Stand is on cooldown.

Choosing the wrong Bizarre Lineage Sub Ability can cripple an otherwise excellent Stand build. For example, Vampire-style players who equip Hamon as their sub-ability receive constant healing, while their opponents using Vampire as their sub-ability are hard-countered by every single Hamon move. Understanding these counter relationships is fundamental to climbing the PvP leaderboard.

Passive Buffs

Sub abilities grant permanent passive effects that activate automatically, like HP regen or damage reduction.

Three Active Moves

Each Bizarre Lineage sub-ability adds 3 new T/Y/U keybind skills that extend your combat toolkit substantially.

Counter Matrix

Hamon hard-counters Vampire. Cyborg's UV move punishes Vampire. Know the counter chart to win matchups.

All Active Bizarre Lineage Sub Abilities (March 2026)

Below are the three currently available Bizarre Lineage Sub Abilities. Review the passive effects, active movesets, and how to unlock each one before committing your time to the questline.

Parts 1–2

Hamon (The Ripple) — Bizarre Lineage Sub Ability

Channel the Ripple energy of the sun through your body. Strong anti-Vampire properties and solid crowd control make Hamon the most beginner-friendly sub-ability in Bizarre Lineage.

Passive Effect

Passive HP regeneration in all conditions. All three Hamon moves deal bonus damage against Vampire-type players.

PvP Value 7/10
PvE Value 7/10
Survival 5/10

Ability Moveset (T / Y / U)

T
Sunlight Yellow Overdrive

A powerful Hamon barrage that stuns the target and deals heavy bonus damage to Vampire-type players.

Y
Sendo Ripple Overdrive

Send a Hamon wave forward that stuns all enemies it passes through. Deals extra damage to Vampires.

U
Scarlet Overdrive

A charged rushing dash-punch that ragdolls the target. Deals additional damage to Vampire users.

🗺️ How to Get

Speak to the Ancient Ghost NPC near Bus Stop 13 and complete its Hamon initiation quest. No currency required — quest completion only.

Pros & Cons

Advantages
  • ✓ Three moves all deal bonus damage vs Vampire — hard counter
  • ✓ Excellent crowd control: stun and ragdoll on multiple moves
  • ✓ Passive HP regen adds survivability in extended fights
  • ✓ Great combo potential, easy to chain after Stand moves
Weaknesses
  • ✗ No defensive or mobility options
  • ✗ Bonus effectiveness only vs Vampire — neutral vs all others
  • ✗ Lower ceiling versus Spin in mirror PvP

Best Stand Pairings

Star PlatinumCrazy DiamondKing CrimsonThe HandMagician's Red
Part 2

Cyborg — Bizarre Lineage Sub Ability

Mechanical enhancements for maximum tankiness. UV blasts, machine gun fire, and missile barrages provide a unique stun-heavy toolkit. The best PvE sub-ability with the highest defensive stats.

Passive Effect

Increases base defense by 15%, reducing all incoming damage. Immune to bleed effects.

PvP Value 6/10
PvE Value 9/10
Survival 9/10

Ability Moveset (T / Y / U)

T
Ultraviolet Radiation Apparatus

Grab an opponent and fire concentrated UV blasts at them. Deals extra damage to Vampire-type players.

Y
Machine Gun

Open your torso and fire a rapid burst of bullets that briefly stuns enemies.

U
Missile Volley

Launch a volley of missiles in a straight line that explode on impact, stunning affected enemies.

🗺️ How to Get

Talk to Rudol von Stroheim NPC near Bus Stop 3 and complete his quest to become a Cyborg.

Pros & Cons

Advantages
  • ✓ Highest survival rating — 15% damage reduction passive
  • ✓ UV apparatus is a hard counter to Vampire users
  • ✓ Stun tools on all three moves for excellent crowd control
  • ✓ AoE damage excels in PvE mob grinding
Weaknesses
  • ✗ Lower PvP versatility — requires setups to be effective
  • ✗ Missile Volley and Machine Gun require good positioning
  • ✗ Slower playstyle doesn't suit aggressive Stands

Best Stand Pairings

Purple HazeKiller QueenGolden Experience
Parts 1–3

Vampire — Bizarre Lineage Sub Ability

Reject your humanity and embrace the power of DIO. Life-stealing blood abilities and powerful crowd control provide top-tier sustain in both PvP and PvE. Hard-countered by Hamon users.

Passive Effect

Grants a blood meter that fills on combat hits. When full, provides a significant HP regeneration bonus (+0.04 HP/0.1s with High Speed Regeneration). Also gives constant passive HP regen (+0.02 HP/0.1s). Red dodge aura.

PvP Value 7/10
PvE Value 8/10
Survival 8/10

Ability Moveset (T / Y / U)

T
Space Ripper Stingy Eyes

Fire pressurized blood beams from your eyes that stun and burn the opponent.

Y
Leeching Terror

Grab an opponent and drain their blood, healing yourself significantly.

U
Flash Freeze

Uppercut, freeze, then slam the opponent into the ground, leaving them stunned.

🗺️ How to Get

Obtain a Vampire Mask (drops randomly or from specific bosses) and use it. Then locate the Elder Vampire NPC inside Dio's Chapel and complete his quest to unlock all three Vampire abilities.

Pros & Cons

Advantages
  • ✓ Powerful blood meter provides a massive regeneration burst
  • ✓ Space Ripper is excellent ranged pressure with stun+burn
  • ✓ Leeching Terror (lifesteal) sustains through long 1vX fights
  • ✓ Flash Freeze creates guaranteed combo openings
Weaknesses
  • ✗ Hard-countered by Hamon users — all Hamon moves deal extra damage
  • ✗ Leeching Terror grab is punishable if whiffed in PvP
  • ✗ Blood meter requires active combat to maintain its benefits

Best Stand Pairings

The WorldKiller QueenThe World: High Voltage

Upcoming Bizarre Lineage Sub Abilities

The following sub-abilities are confirmed to be added in a future update but are not yet available in-game.

Coming Soon

Spin — Bizarre Lineage Sub Ability (Upcoming)

Master the art of the Steel Ball. Ranged pressure with block bypass makes Spin the highest-skill-cap sub-ability. ⚠️ Spin is currently not available in-game and is expected to be added in a future update.

Projected PvP 9/10
Projected PvE 5/10
Survival 3/10

Sub Abilities FAQ

What are all the Bizarre Lineage Sub Abilities?

As of March 2026, the active Bizarre Lineage Sub Abilities are Hamon (The Ripple), Cyborg, and Vampire. A fourth sub-ability, Spin, was briefly available during early testing but is currently not in the game and is expected to return in a future update.

Which Bizarre Lineage Sub Ability is best for PvP?

For PvP, the Hamon and Vampire Sub Abilities are the strongest options. Hamon provides three stun/ragdoll moves that all deal extra damage to Vampire users. Vampire offers a ranged beam (Space Ripper Stingy Eyes), a lifesteal grab, and a guaranteed combo starter (Flash Freeze). When Spin is added, it will be rated highest for PvP due to its block-bypass mechanic.

How do I get the Vampire Sub Ability in Bizarre Lineage?

To unlock the Vampire Sub Ability in Bizarre Lineage, you must first obtain a Vampire Mask (which drops randomly or from specific bosses) and use it to reject your humanity. After that, locate the Elder Vampire NPC inside Dio's Chapel and complete his quest to unlock all three Vampire abilities: Space Ripper Stingy Eyes, Leeching Terror, and Flash Freeze.

How do I get Hamon in Bizarre Lineage?

To get the Hamon Sub Ability in Bizarre Lineage, speak to the Ancient Ghost NPC near Bus Stop 13 and complete its initiation quest. Unlike some other sub-abilities, Hamon does not require any in-game currency — only completing the questline.

Is Spin available in Bizarre Lineage?

Spin is currently NOT available in Bizarre Lineage. It was present in early testing but was removed before the full release. The developers are expected to add Spin in a future update. Check the official Trello for announcements.

How to Equip Bizarre Lineage Sub Abilities

Follow these steps to efficiently unlock your desired sub-ability on your first attempt.

1
Check the Counter Chart

Before spending time on a questline, identify if your Stand's weakness can be covered by a specific sub-ability. Vampire Stands benefit most from Hamon sub to get an anti-counter option.

2
Locate the NPC

All Bizarre Lineage Sub Ability NPCs are tied to specific bus stops. Hamon: Bus Stop 13. Cyborg: Bus Stop 3. Vampire: Use a Vampire Mask first, then head to Dio's Chapel.

3
Complete the Quest

Each NPC provides a short quest. Complete it to unlock the sub-ability permanently. Hamon requires no currency; Vampire requires a Vampire Mask item beforehand.

4
Bind & Practice

Your new T, Y, U keys now perform your sub-ability moves. Spend time in a low-risk zone practicing the timing before jumping into ranked PvP with other Bizarre Lineage players.

Pair the Right Bizarre Lineage Sub Ability with the Perfect Stand

Now that you're a sub-ability expert, maximize your damage potential by pairing your choice with a top-tier Stand. Check our full tier list and code database to find the optimal combo.
